title: Formal SignWriting
subtitle: Plain-text encodings, grammar, search, rendering, styling, and implementation of written sign text
description: A technical publication series on the Formal SignWriting model as durable computational text for written sign language, with a clear distinction between canonical text and presentation markup.

publication_strategy.notes: The series is the primary technical home for Formal SignWriting, while the Internet-Draft remains a related historical artifact with its own DOI.
